stemHtml: A straight, cambered wing aeroplane is used to demonstrate slow flight and stalls to a student pilot. The pilot maintains straight and level flight while the speed decreases until the aeroplane eventually stalls. During this demonstration, the centre of pressure...

options.a: moves forward until the stall, then moves aft.
options.b: remains in the same position even through the stall.
options.c: moves aft until the stall, then moves forward.
options.d: remains in the same position until moving aft at the stall.
